title: aconitum × acutum
intro: Aconitum × acutum, also known as the hybrid monk's hood or aconitum hybrid, is a rare, perennial flowering plant that is a cross between Aconitum variegatum and Aconitum uncinatum. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, due to the presence of alkaloids such as aconitine. The health benefits of Aconitum × acutum include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity. Aconitum × acutum is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is typically used in small doses under the guidance of a qualified herbalist or healthcare professional.
